subject: IBAS Alert 4162: Not a GRB
body:
S.Mereghetti (IASF-Milano), D.Gotz (CEA-Saclay) and N.Mowlavi (ISDC- 
Versoix) on behalf of the IBAS Localization Team communicate

IBAS Alert n. 4162 is not due to a GRB.  It has been caused by a known 
source. The attitude information was incorrect at the time of the trigger
